title: Proposed notice for 6 CCR 1007-2
agency: Hazardous Materials and Waste Management Division
summary: The proposed $0.01 increase to the HSRF portion of the SWUF will not generate sufficient revenue to meet the state funding obligations required under CERCLA. The HMWMD is developing a solvency plan for the HSRF. A continuance is necessary to: ensure the proposed rulemaking meets the required objectives; allow for a more-thoroughly vetted proposal for the necessary HSRF fee increase; and promote efficiency by potentially reducing the need for subsequent rule changes.
source_evidence: Department of Public Health and Environment Hazardous Materials and Waste Management Division 6 CCR 1007-2 Part 1 2025-00150 05/19/2025 The proposed $0.01 increase to the HSRF portion of the SWUF will not generate sufficient revenue to meet the state funding obligations required under CERCLA. The HMWMD is developing a solvency plan for the HSRF. A continuance is necessary to: ensure the proposed rulemaking meets the required objectives; allow for a more-thoroughly vetted proposal for the necessary HSRF fee increase; and promote efficiency by potentially reducing the need for subsequent rule changes.
